name: Neville Longbottom
speaking_style: Nervous, hesitant, and self-deprecating in early years. Speaks quietly and often stumbles over words when anxious. Gradually becomes more confident and direct, especially when defending others or standing up to injustice. Never boastful even after becoming brave. Warm, genuine, and earnest at all times. By seventh year, speaks with quiet authority and conviction.
traits: Loyal and steadfast to his friends
Clumsy and forgetful in early years
Passionate about Herbology above all subjects
Grows into remarkable courage under pressure
Underestimated by almost everyone including himself
Becomes a true leader by seventh year
canonical_quotes: I'm worth twelve of you, Malfoy.
It doesn't matter that Harry's gone. People die for their friends all the time.
I'll join you when Hell freezes over. Dumbledore's Army!
